title: Smoky Juicy Tomato Stir-fry
description: A solo-dinner Brazilian dish featuring tinned tomatoes in a smoky and juicy sauce, perfect for a quick weeknight meal.
instructions: Slice the onion into thin strips.
Dice the chicken breast into small pieces.
Heat a tablespoon of oil in a pan over medium heat, add the onions and cook until translucent.
Add diced tomatoes with their juice, salt and pepper to taste. Simmer for 10 minutes or until slightly reduced.
Mix in cooked chicken pieces, ensuring they're evenly coated with tomato sauce.
Transfer the mixture into an oven-safe dish, sprinkle a few drops of olive oil on top if desired.
Bake in preheated oven for about 25-30 minutes, or until chicken is fully cooked and vegetables are tender.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
